data.title: AMTD Group Partners with Alibaba in Film and Entertainment
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

AMTD IDEA Group Class A ( (SG:HKB) ) has provided an announcement.

AMTD Group, through its subsidiary WME, has announced a partnership with Alibaba Pictures Culture to collaborate on film investments and development in the Chinese film industry. This alliance aims for a long-term collaboration in culture, entertainment, and fashion media, marking a strategic move to explore and develop domestic and international projects, potentially enhancing AMTD’s positioning in the global entertainment industry.

More about AMTD IDEA Group Class A

AMTD IDEA Group is a diversified institution and digital solutions group, connecting companies and investors with global markets. It operates in media and entertainment, education and training, and premium assets and hospitality sectors. Under AMTD Digital, WME focuses on the group’s global strategies in multimedia, entertainment, and cultural affairs.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: S$1.43B

An announcement from BIGG Digital Assets ( (TSE:BIGG) ) is now available.

BIGG Digital Assets Inc. announced that its subsidiary, TerraZero, has completed its 2024 development roadmap for Intraverse and is now focusing on the public launch, user onboarding, and revenue generation for 2025. TerraZero’s efforts are aimed at creating immersive virtual experiences that connect music artists, creators, and brands with fans, while also opening new revenue streams through customizable virtual environments and bespoke builds.

More about BIGG Digital Assets

BIGG Digital Assets Inc. is a leading innovator in the digital assets space, owning Netcoins, Blockchain Intelligence Group, and TerraZero. The company focuses on providing solutions and services related to digital assets, with a market emphasis on blockchain technology and virtual environments.

data.title: Scana’s Subseatec Secures Key Subsea Framework Agreement
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Scana ASA ( (DE:1MP) ) has issued an announcement.

Scana ASA’s subsidiary, Subseatec S AB, has entered into a significant framework agreement to become the exclusive global supplier of steel components for subsea production systems with an international subsea company. This agreement, effective in the first quarter of 2025 and lasting three years, highlights Subseatec’s competitiveness and technical expertise, with expected substantial contract value between NOK 25 million and NOK 75 million, strengthening Scana’s position in the subsea industry.

More about Scana ASA

Scana ASA is an industrial owner active in technology and services for the energy and offshore industry, with a strong focus on innovation and quality. Headquartered in Bergen, Scana has a rich industrial history since the early 1900s and employs over 600 people. Its subsidiary, Subseatec S AB, is a specialist in steel riser applications for the oil and gas industry.

YTD Price Performance: -12.61%

Average Trading Volume: 1,434

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Hold

Current Market Cap: €101M

data.title: Dentsply Sirona Expands Board with Two New Directors
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

The latest update is out from DENTSPLY SIRONA ( (XRAY) ).

On February 5, 2025, Dentsply Sirona’s Board announced the appointment of Michael J. Barber and Daniel T. Scavilla as new directors, expanding the Board from 10 to 11 members. Barber, with a background in product management and innovation at GE, and Scavilla, CEO of Globus Medical, are expected to contribute significantly to Dentsply Sirona’s transformation strategy and strategic growth. Concurrently, Dr. Dorothea Wenzel resigned from the Board due to the increased demands of her new chair nomination. The appointments aim to enhance expertise in healthcare, technology, and finance to support the company’s vision of transforming dentistry.

More about DENTSPLY SIRONA

Dentsply Sirona is the world’s largest manufacturer of professional dental products and technologies, providing comprehensive solutions for dental and oral health care. With a focus on innovation and service, the company aims to enhance patient care and advance safety in dental practices globally. Headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina, Dentsply Sirona’s products are marketed under a strong portfolio of world-class brands and are traded on Nasdaq under the symbol XRAY.

YTD Price Performance: 2.88%

Average Trading Volume: 3,337,668

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $3.83B

data.title: MRC Global Delays 2024 Financial Results Release
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

MRC Global ( (MRC) ) has shared an update.

MRC Global announced a postponement of its fourth quarter and full-year 2024 financial results release, initially scheduled for February 11 and 12, 2025. The delay allows additional time for year-end audit procedures related to inventory cycle counts, with the company expecting to file its Form 10-K by March 3, 2025.

More about MRC Global

MRC Global, headquartered in Houston, Texas, is a leading global distributor of pipe, valves, fittings, and other infrastructure products and services. The company serves diverse end-markets including gas utilities, downstream, industrial, energy transition, and production and transmission infrastructure sectors. With over a century of experience, MRC Global provides innovative supply chain solutions and technical product expertise through a network of 198 locations worldwide.

data.description:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

An announcement from Trifecta Gold ( (TSE:TG) ) is now available.

Trifecta Gold Ltd. reported a transformational year in 2024, having secured a US listing and an option to acquire 11 projects within the Yukon portion of the Tombstone Gold Belt. This move positions Trifecta as a leading explorer in the region. The company highlighted exploration progress at its Mt. Hinton project, which features significant gold and silver mineralization across four major vein corridors. Recent drilling results confirm impressive gold grades, reinforcing Trifecta’s strategic exploration plans for 2025.

More about Trifecta Gold

Trifecta Gold Ltd. operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration of gold and silver deposits. The company is particularly involved in the Tombstone Gold Belt region, known for significant gold systems and deposits.

An update from Intelligent Protection Management ( (IPM) ) is now available.

Intelligent Protection Management Corp. presented an investor presentation highlighting its strategic focus and recent developments, including significant legal victories such as an awarded $65.7 million verdict against Cisco Systems for patent infringement, dated August 29, 2024. The presentation also emphasized the company’s growth potential, market positioning, and the expertise of its seasoned management team. Despite uncertainties, the company remains optimistic about realizing benefits from its recent acquisitions and maintaining a strong brand in a competitive market.

More about Intelligent Protection Management

Intelligent Protection Management Corp. operates as a managed technology solutions provider with a focus on cybersecurity and cloud infrastructure. The company offers a range of services, including managed IT security, professional services, secure private cloud hosting, and managed backup and disaster recovery for enterprise and commercial clients across the United States.

data.title: Shinhan Financial Group Announces Strong 2024 Revenue Growth Amid Net Income Challenges
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

The latest announcement is out from Shinhan Financial Group Co ( (SHG) ).

On February 6, 2025, Shinhan Financial Group reported its preliminary operating results for the fiscal year 2024, showcasing notable financial growth despite some challenges. The group’s revenue for the fourth quarter of 2024 saw a significant year-over-year increase of 104.59%, while cumulative revenue rose by 21.50%. However, the group’s net income for the specified quarter declined by 12.98% compared to the previous year. These results highlight Shinhan Financial Group’s robust revenue growth, although pressure on net income margins remains a concern for stakeholders.

More about Shinhan Financial Group Co

Shinhan Financial Group Co., Ltd. is a prominent player in the financial services industry, primarily engaged in banking, insurance, and credit card services. The company focuses on providing a wide range of financial solutions to individual and corporate clients, with a significant presence in the Korean market.
